headline: CME Group to Launch Single Stock Futures on July 27
summary: CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced it will launch Single Stock futures across more than 50 of the top U.S. stocks on July 27, pending completion of all regulatory review and processes. This new offering will include 55 larger-sized and 22 Micro-sized futures contracts, providing market participants with additional flexibility to manage their equity exposure.

content.title: CME Group to Launch Single Stock Futures on July 27
content.summary: CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced it will launch Single Stock futures across more than 50 of the top U.S. stocks on July 27, pending completion of all regulatory review and processes. This new offering will include 55 larger-sized and 22 Micro-sized futures contracts, providing market participants with additional flexibility to manage their equity exposure.

headline: Meta (META) Turns Inward On AI After Google Limits Gemini Access
summary: Google has restricted Meta Platforms' access to its Gemini AI models, citing industry wide compute shortages. The change has disrupted Meta's internal AI projects that relied on Gemini for training and experimentation. Meta is accelerating work on its in house AI systems, including models such as Muse Spark, to reduce reliance on external providers. For investors watching NasdaqGS:META, this shift in AI access lands at a time when the stock trades around $562.60 and longer term returns show...

headline: Mizuho lifts TSMC CoWoS capacity forecasts as server CPU demand surges
summary: Investing.com -- Mizuho Securities Asia raised its forecast for TSMC's monthly CoWoS packaging capacity to 140,000 units by 2026 and 190,000–200,000 units by 2027, up from prior estimates of 120,000 and 170,000–180,000 respectively, as a sharply upgraded outlook for AI-driven server CPU demand forces a broad revision to the firm's semiconductor supply model.

content.title: Mizuho lifts TSMC CoWoS capacity forecasts as server CPU demand surges
content.summary: Investing.com -- Mizuho Securities Asia raised its forecast for TSMC's monthly CoWoS packaging capacity to 140,000 units by 2026 and 190,000–200,000 units by 2027, up from prior estimates of 120,000 and 170,000–180,000 respectively, as a sharply upgraded outlook for AI-driven server CPU demand forces a broad revision to the firm's semiconductor supply model.
